# Toilet as a Service

> An interactive product satire about attention-funded public infrastructure.

Toilet as a Service (T/AAS) presents a fictional network of public restrooms
where access is exchanged for one fixed sponsor message: watch 12 seconds,
unlock 4 minutes. The service is fictional; the interactive experience is
fully functional and collects no personal data.

## Canonical resources

- Product: https://toilet-as-a-service.juliosuas.chatgpt.site/
- Press room: https://toilet-as-a-service.juliosuas.chatgpt.site/press
- RSS feed: https://toilet-as-a-service.juliosuas.chatgpt.site/feed.xml
- Source: https://github.com/juliosuas/toilet-as-a-service
- Release: https://github.com/juliosuas/toilet-as-a-service/releases/tag/v1.0.0

## Core facts

- Format: interactive satire and speculative product design
- Setting: Mexico City
- Access exchange: one 12-second sponsor message for four minutes of access
- Privacy: no accounts, payments, precise location, or behavioral profiles
- Status: public conceptual release; no physical restroom network exists
